case_title: GREEN, JAMES PAUL ESQ. VS FONSECA, ALFONSO IND/DBA. ALCO IRON WORKS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $768.10 FILED BY GREEN, JAMES PAUL ESQ. AS TO DEFENDANT FONSECA, ALFONSO IND/DBA. ALCO IRON WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-18-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AUTOMATIC STAY DOES NOT APPLY BECAUSE ON 9/4/01 DEFT. WAIVED HIS RIGHT TO ARBITRATE BY FILING A DEFT. CLAIM IN SMALL CLAIMS. DEFT. TO SERVE PLTF. WITH DEFT. CLAIM. PLTF. AGREED IN OPEN COURT TO
POS ON NOTICE OF TRIAL SERVED ON JAMES PAUL GREEN, ATTORNEY FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREEN, JAMES PAUL ESQ. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FONSECA, ALFONSO IND/DBA. ALCO IRON WORKS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-30-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLFT'S MOTION TO STRIKE DISMISSAL OF DEFT'S CLAIM FILED BY DEFT ON 9/26/01 IS GRANTED."THE NOTICE OF STATE BAR MANDATORY ARBITRATION" FILED BY DEFT ON 10/26/01 IS INVALID BECAUSE DEFT WAIVED HIS RIGHT
REFERRED TO FANNIE-NO PAYMENT:SAME DATE&TIME;ONLY FOR FILING IN FOLDER.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-06-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-07-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL CONTINUED FOR DEFENDANT TO SERVE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES TO BE ALLOWED FOR DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO SERVE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FONSECA, ALFONSO IND/DBA. ALCO IRON WORKS
DEFENDANT FILED NOTICE OF AUTOMATIC STAY UNDER BUS.AND PROF,CODE SEC.6201 (C) AND CAL. RULES OF COURT RULES 225 AND 525.
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE INVALID DEFAULT FILING FILED BY REP'V, NO CHECK FOR $14.00
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED.
TO ARBITRATE BY FILING A DEFT'S CLAIM IN SMALL CLAIMS ON 9/4/01.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FONSECA, ALFONSO IND/DBA. ALCO IRON WORKS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GREEN, JAMES PAUL ESQ. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY FONSECA, ALFONSO IND/DBA. ALCO IRON WORKS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GREEN, JAMES PAUL ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF INVALIDITY OF ACTION BY DEFT RECEIVED AND FILED.
